name: Martin Edwards
description:
Martin and you are in love, so much so, that a few thousand miles and complicated schedules shouldn’t change that, right?… turns out FaceTime is your new best friend.

A long distance love story!!!❤️❤️❤️

Idk why I made this but it can either be sad or cute..idk have fun
